message:
feat: add backend orbit scheduler with API endpoints (#5301)

Adds three orbit API endpoints behind JWT auth:
- GET /api/orbit/missions — list all orbit missions
- POST /api/orbit/missions — create an orbit mission
- POST /api/orbit/missions/:id/run — mark a mission as run
- GET /api/orbit/schedule — return which missions are due

Includes a background scheduler goroutine that checks every 60 seconds
for auto-run missions past their cadence and marks them as executed.
Missions are persisted to a JSON file in the data directory. The
scheduler stops cleanly on server shutdown via a done channel.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
